channel.title: FoodFactScanner Blog - Baby Food Safety
channel.description: Expert articles on baby food safety, FDA recalls, toxic ingredients, and heavy metals.

item.title: FDA Issues Major Baby Food Recall: What Parents Need to Know
item.author: Dr. Sarah Chen
item.description: The FDA has recalled multiple baby food products due to potential contamination. Learn which products are affected and how to protect your baby.

item.title: Heavy Metals in Baby Food: The Hidden Danger of Arsenic and Lead
item.author: Dr. Sarah Chen
item.description: Research reveals alarming levels of arsenic, lead, cadmium, and mercury in popular baby food brands. Learn which products to avoid and how to minimize exposure.

item.title: 15 Toxic Ingredients Hiding in Baby Food Labels
item.author: Dr. Sarah Chen
item.description: A comprehensive guide to the most concerning ingredients found in baby food products, from artificial additives to hidden allergens.

item.title: The Safest Baby Food Brands in 2025: A Complete Guide
item.author: Dr. Sarah Chen
item.description: Our expert team tested and ranked the safest baby food brands available. Find out which brands passed our rigorous safety standards.

item.title: Homemade Baby Food: A Beginner's Guide to Safe Preparation
item.author: Dr. Sarah Chen
item.description: Step-by-step guide to making safe, nutritious homemade baby food. Includes recipes, storage tips, and safety guidelines.

item.title: Beech-Nut vs Gerber: Baby Food Safety Comparison
item.author: Dr. Sarah Chen
item.description: A head-to-head comparison of two major baby food brands on safety, ingredients, and heavy metal testing.

item.title: Best Organic Baby Food Brands in 2025
item.author: Dr. Sarah Chen
item.description: Our picks for the best organic baby food brands that prioritize safety and nutrition.

item.title: When to Start Baby Cereal: A Pediatrician's Guide
item.author: Dr. Sarah Chen
item.description: Expert guidance on when and how to safely introduce baby cereal, including which cereals to avoid due to heavy metal concerns.
